seo.title: Direct Hotel Distribution: A Practical Guide | Wink
seo.metaDescription: Direct hotel distribution explained: turn website, social, partner and marketplace demand into bookings while keeping brand, guest data and checkout.
seo.ogDescription: Direct hotel distribution explained: how hotels turn website, social, partner, marketplace, and API demand into confirmed bookings while keeping control of brand, guest data, channel terms, and checkout.

cards.title: Social and content
cards.body: Posts, profiles, QR codes, and bookable cards that send guests into the right offer.

cards.title: Partner channels
cards.body: Partners, agencies, DMCs, communities, events, banks, loyalty programs, and platforms with measurable source attribution.

cards.title: Traveliko
cards.body: A Wink-operated consumer channel where active hotel inventory can be discovered.

cards.title: API access
cards.body: Search, booking, payment, webhook, and SDK surfaces for platform teams.

cards.title: Booking Engine
cards.body: The transaction layer that converts demand into rooms, packages, add-ons, dining, spa, experiences, or inquiries.

items.question: Does direct distribution mean no OTAs?
items.answer: No. OTAs still earn reach and comparison demand. Direct distribution is about winning the guests you can win directly - at 5.5% all-in on Wink instead of 15-25% - and owning the data and the repeat booking.

items.question: What is the first direct-distribution step?
items.answer: Start by mapping every demand source to a clear next step: room, package, offer, inquiry, Partner card, or Booking Engine path.

items.question: Can Partner demand be direct distribution?
items.answer: Yes. When partner demand is measurable, connects to approved hotel supply, and carries 6-month attribution into the booking, it is direct distribution - the hotel sets the 10% default commission and keeps the guest.

items.question: Where does Wink fit?
items.answer: Wink runs hotel supply, content, partner demand, Booking Engine conversion, 6-month attribution, Traveliko, and API access on one platform - at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
